retry_reason: Put operation always succeeds; if refcount is already zero it indicates a bug (double free), so retry is dangerous and unnecessary.
contract_summary: This function is a put wrapper for the per-VMA vma_list structure in bpf_arena. It decrements the mmap_count refcount. If the refcount reaches zero (last reference), it acquires the arena lock, removes the vml from the arena's list, clears the VMA's private data pointer, and frees the vml. Otherwise it simply returns. Used as the VMA close handler, it ensures cleanup occurs only when all mappings are closed. The caller (VMA subsystem) must call this exactly once per VMA close; multiple calls would cause use-after-free.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to decrement the mmap_count refcount on a vma_list structure and free it when the last reference is released; all logic (including lock and list manipulation under the zero path) is tied to refcount lifecycle.

The access path vma.vm_private_data.mmap_count.refs starts from parameter 1 (vma), follows the field to the refcount field refs.
